## Epic 5 — Magic System (#54)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design and write spell chains for cantrips + 1st-level equivalent spells, organized by elemental/theme chains.

### Chains to Design
Each chain = 3 tiers (Novice cantrip → Adept 1st-level → opens to Master in future chains)

| Chain Name | Novice (Cantrip) | Adept (1st-level equiv) | Dice Req |
|------------|------------------|------------------------|----------|
| Fire Magic | Firebolt | Burning Hands | 1 Fire |
| Ice Magic | Ray of Frost | Ice Knife | 1 Water |
| Lightning | Shocking Grasp | Witch Bolt | 1 Wind |
| Acid Magic | Acid Splash | Tasha's Caustic Brew | 1 Earth |
| Force Magic | Eldritch Blast | Magic Missile | 1 Energy |
| Radiant | Sacred Flame | Guiding Bolt | 1 Energy |
| Necrotic | Chill Touch | Inflict Wounds | 1 Energy |
| Psychic | Vicious Mockery | Dissonant Whispers | 1 Guile |
| Healing | Spare the Dying | Cure Wounds | 1 Animal |
| Protection | Resistance | Shield | 1 Protection |
| Charm | Friends | Charm Person | 1 Guile |
| Illusion | Minor Illusion | Silent Image | 1 Wind |
| Nature | Druidcraft | Entangle | 1 Animal |
| Divination | Guidance | Detect Magic | 1 Knowledge |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design each chain's Novice and Adept tier
- [ ] Write each spell with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Determine dice prerequisites for each chain
- [ ] Write as formatted AsciiDoc entries
- [ ] Create chain quick-reference tables by element/category
